data.body: Phase 0-1 done. Epic positive-merry-hake (2610-9557-c3c1-460c) = v1.0 release-readiness hardening, 5 stories flat, all with signed plan-review attestations. Dependency chain for release.yml: 08a8 (F4 pin) <- 6168 (F3 build-once) <- fd84 (F1 release-auth). Independent: 21dd (F2 store-compat gate, highest prio, must ship in v1.0), 36c7 (F5 tombstone registry). Worktree ~/rebar-epic-hake on branch epic/positive-merry-hake from origin/main f2591071a. venv + commit-msg hook installed. Plan: work independent Python-heavy stories first (21dd, 36c7) with held-out TDD, then the release.yml stack 08a8->6168->fd84.
